review_notes: This entry records a redacted Auth/RBAC smoke summary for the 4f2b043 Foundation Alpha POC runtime on PR #28.
The API and worker containers reported image ai-platform:4f2b043-context-summary with matching source revision labels before the smoke was recorded.

The reviewed summary omits credentials, DSNs, object locators, executor internals, runtime workspace paths, storage locators, user identifiers beyond synthetic smoke IDs, and personal workstation paths.

This evidence supports the Foundation Alpha POC security baseline only. It does not close production auth rollout, capacity, sandbox hardening, ordinary-user multi-agent, department rollout, runtime export, or release-evidence retention gates.
